title: xyris ornithoptera
intro: Xyris ornithoptera, also known as the 'Tiger Flower', is a species of flowering plant in the family Xyridaceae, characterized by its showy yellow or orange flowers with dark stripes. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. Xyris ornithoptera has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions. The herbal preparations of the plant, typically in the form of infusions or decoctions, are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
